final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: luxury jewelry catalog shot, 1:1 square crop
Primary request: hyper-realistic macro close-up of a sapphire ring with diamond halo, fire and brilliance visible inside the gemstone
Scene/backdrop: pure black velvet fabric, seamless and texture-rich
Subject: cushion-cut deep blue sapphire center stone, surrounded by pavé-set brilliant-cut diamonds, platinum or white gold band with intricate milgrain detail
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, macro jewelry shot
Composition/framing: extreme close-up macro, 90mm macro lens, shallow depth of field isolating the ring
Lighting/mood: studio lighting with focused spotlight creating internal reflections and fire in the sapphire, dramatic and luxurious
Color palette: deep royal blue + diamond white sparkles + platinum silver + black velvet
Materials/textures: faceted sapphire with visible internal brilliance, crisp diamond facets, soft matte black velvet, polished precious metal
Constraints: sapphire must show fire and light dispersion, diamonds must sparkle with clear facets, velvet texture must be visible
Avoid: plastic-looking gems, flat lighting, oversaturated colors, artificial glow effects, watermark
